context.summary: Use micro:bitГўВҖВҷs radio feature to answer questions in secret.
how_it_works: Flash this program on to two micro:bits. You and a friend ask each other questions that have ГўВҖВҳyesГўВҖВҷ or ГўВҖВҳnoГўВҖВҷ as the answer.
Press input button A to send ГўВҖВҳyesГўВҖВҷ and button B to send ГўВҖВҳnoГўВҖВҷ messages. A tick or cross will flash on both micro:bitsГўВҖВҷ LED display outputs for half a second.
The program uses radio to send your answer secretly - no-one (except your partner) can hear the radio signal.

When a radio message is received, the program uses selection to test the message: if the received message is equal to ГўВҖВҳyesГўВҖВҷ, then it shows a tick on the LED display, but if the message is equal to ГўВҖВҳnoГўВҖВҷ then it shows a cross.
Make sure the radio group number is the same on both micro:bits ГўВҖВ“ you can use any number between 0 and 255.
If lots of you are using this program in the same place, youГўВҖВҷll want to make sure each pair of people has their own radio group number.
Keep your radio group number a secret if you don't want anyone snooping on your messages!
improve_it: Show different icons or messages for ГўВҖВҳyesГўВҖВҷ and ГўВҖВҳnoГўВҖВҷ.
Use shake, tilt or buttons A and B together to send different answers such as ГўВҖВҳmaybe.ГўВҖВҷ
Change ГўВҖВҳyesГўВҖВҷ and ГўВҖВҳnoГўВҖВҷ to ГўВҖВҳdotГўВҖВҷ and ГўВҖВҳdashГўВҖВҷ and send Morse code messages.

code.source:
from microbit import *
import radio
radio.config(group=7)
radio.on()

while True:
    message = radio.receive()
    if message:
        if message == 'yes':
            display.show(Image.YES)
            sleep(500)
            display.clear()
        elif message == 'no':
            display.show(Image.NO)
            sleep(500)
            display.clear()
    if button_a.was_pressed():
        radio.send('yes')
        display.show(Image.YES)
        sleep(500)
        display.clear()
    if button_b.was_pressed():
        radio.send('no')
        display.show(Image.NO)
        sleep(500)
        display.clear()
